full_description: HabitBuddy is a habit tracking app designed to help you build positive habits and break negative ones. With HabitBuddy, you can set reminders to perform your daily habits, track your progress, and earn rewards to motivate you. The app allows you to customize your habits, set specific goals, and track your progress over time. HabitBuddy also provides a community feature where you can share your progress with friends and join groups to stay motivated. Our app is designed to be simple, intuitive, and easy to use, making it the perfect tool for anyone looking to improve their daily habits and achieve their goals.
